hero.title: Job Tracker
hero.description: Track job listings, applications, insights, and application history in one organized workspace.

flow.title: Jobs → Applications → Insights → History
steps: Add jobs you want to track
Log application history as the process moves

differences.title: Keep job search activity connected
differences.description: Job Tracker links listings, applications, insights, and history so the job search does not scatter across notes and spreadsheets.

items.title: Job listings
items.description: Capture role, company, location, source, status, priority, and notes.

items.title: Applications
items.description: Track application status, follow-up dates, contacts, resume versions, and cover letters.

items.title: Insights and history
items.description: Record action items, recommendations, events, and next steps.

feel.title: A tidy command center for job applications
feel.description: The workflow keeps job opportunities and application movement visible without overcomplicating the process.

items.title: Track the job
items.description: Start with a clear listing record.

items.title: Manage the application
items.description: Follow status, contacts, documents, and dates.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: Use insights and history to decide what needs attention.

audiences.title: Who uses Job Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for people managing active job searches and application pipelines.

items.title: Job seekers
items.description: Track roles, applications, and follow-ups in one place.

items.title: Career planners
items.description: Review job search activity and next steps.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Organize opportunities while exploring a career move.
